name: ponytail-forge-debt
description: Use this skill when the user wants every `ponytail-forge:` marker comment in the repo collected into a debt ledger: file, line, what was simplified, the named ceiling, and the upgrade trigger. Flags markers with no upgrade trigger as 'no-trigger' rot risk. Read-only report unless the user asks to persist it to a file. Adapted from ponytail-debt (DietrichGebert/ponytail, MIT).
